_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: By contrast, EGFP–K-Ras WT and EGFP–K-Ras T50I did not rescue these cells from AC220-induced death
details: EGFP–K-Ras WT and EGFP–K-Ras T50I did not rescue cells from AC220-induced death
